This directory is automatically created by script https://svn.oss.deltares.nl/repos/delft3d/trunk/src/scripts_lgpl/win64/oss-install_x64.cmd 
This script is executed via a post-build event of https://svn.oss.deltares.nl/repos/delft3d/trunk/src/engines_gpl/dimr/packages/dimr/dimr_exe.vcxproj 
Further modifications can be done via a Python script executed via "DIMR_collector" projects in TeamCity
